description: Observability Sampling Bias — sub-scrape-interval pod invisible to Prometheus, fully captured by OMA

oma.note: No sampling gap — every event delivered at occurrence

paper_contribution.claim: Poll-based observability has a structural blind spot for sub-interval pod lifetimes. This is not a configuration issue — it is an architectural property.
paper_contribution.table_row: H5 | Per scrape interval | Poll-based architecture | Sub-interval pod lifetimes invisible to Prometheus | P001 (existing) — watch-based, no polling gap
